description: Traccar is an open-source GPS tracking platform for servers, devices, and mobile apps. It lets users track devices, manage fleets, view positions and events, and generate reports on self-hosted, demo, or subscription server instances.
summary: Traccar exposes a documented REST API (OpenAPI) for GPS tracking server management and data access, plus a separately documented public `/health` HTTP endpoint; no GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI were found.
